node_data.name: Caprese Sandwich — Citrus Fresh Variation
node_data.short_description: Caprese-style sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic—a fresh, protein- and fiber-rich lunch option.
node_data.meal_suggestion: One sandwich serves as a balanced lunch. For the Citrus Fresh Variation, add a light squeeze of lemon or orange juice over the filling or serve with citrus wedges; consider a small side salad for extra greens.
node_data.nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-grain bread and vegetables; protein from mozzarella; vitamins and antioxidants from tomato and basil; balsamic adds flavor with modest calories.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This is a Caprese Sandwich option for the Child on Day 5, matching both the meal type and the portability requirement.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 5 > Lunch > Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Set

node_data.name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Set
node_data.short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Enjoy with a side salad or fruit; drizzle a teaspoon of olive oil for healthy fats if desired; keep portion size moderate to fit a balanced meal.
node_data.nutrition_note: Balanced meal with protein from mozzarella and fiber from whole-grain bread; tomato and basil provide vitamins and antioxidants; balsamic adds flavor with minimal calories; moderate sodium from cheese. For lower fat, use part-skim mozzarella.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This is another Caprese Sandwich variation for the Child on Day 5.

node_data.name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Variation
node_data.short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic; maple-kissed variation optional with a light maple glaze.
node_data.meal_suggestion: A quick, balanced lunch: Caprese sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic. For the maple-kissed twist, drizzle a small amount of maple-balsamic glaze.
node_data.nutrition_note: Includes fiber from whole-grain bread and protein plus calcium from mozzarella; tomatoes and basil supply vitamins and antioxidants; balsamic adds flavor with modest sugars. A maple-kissed variation can use a light maple-balsamic glaze to introduce sweetness without heavy sugar load.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This is a Caprese Sandwich option for the Child on Day 2, satisfying the query's search for days with this specific meal.
